text:
Created attachment 250285
Patch 10.0.14 to 10.0.15

This is a patch release of www/glpi  from 10.0.14 to 10.0.15.

Mostly a security release (2 high severity security fixes).

ChangeLog:
- https://github.com/glpi-project/glpi/releases/tag/10.0.15

Also attached the Poudriere testport logs.

Will open a separate PR with adds the VUXML entry.
